name: my-portfolio-root
description: Root workspace for Virendra Kumar Portfolio MERN application

scripts.install:render: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev --prefix server
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run client" "npm run server"
scripts.build:render: npm run install:render && npm run build
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run start
